SPM NFL: 49ers Va. Seahawks
Wie have been high on this Sechowks team all season long,
and that stance dates back to Woek 1 when our vary first POM
of the year wos SEA +3.5 on the rood against this same 49ers
team. White Seattle came up short in that opener with o 17-13
boss, everything since then has only reinforced that read. The
Seohowks have now won nine of their last ten games, with their
lone loss coming against the Rams, who have emerged as the
second-best teom in the NFL. When these teoms mot just
fourteen days ogo, Seattle went on the road and won 13-3 ino
game thot was for more lopsided than the final score indicates.
Tonight, in the third and finol meeting between these division
fivals, the matchup sets up even more favorably for Seattle.
Over their lost three games, the 49ers are scoring Asst 22.7
PPG, despite posting respectoble yardage totals. They ore
averaging 6.3 yards per play, 4.6 yards per carry, 7.6 yords per
pass attempt, and completing 68 percent of their passes. That
production now runs directly into o Seattle defense allowing
just 5 yords per play, 36 yards per carry, 6.2 yords per pass
attempt, and a 62 percent completion rate over the same span.
Those efficiency gops have translated to only 16.7 PPG aBowed
by Seattle during that stretch. This is o defense that tightens in
high-leverage situations, and San Francisco hes already shown
they cannot finish drives against this unit.
On the other side of the ball, Son Francisco is surrendering
22 PPG on the season while allowing 5&6 yards per play, 6.7
yards per pass attempt, and a 67 percent completion rate.
That defensive profile now faces a Seattle offense operating at
@ higher efficiency level. The Seahawks ore averaging 6 yards
per play, &.1 yards per pass attempt, and compieting 68
percent of their passes while scoring 28.4 PPG on the season.
They ore producing that output on 4.1 yards per carry, which
matches up cleanly against a 49e¢s run defense allowing 4.3
yords per carry. This is on offense that does not need a single
dominont phase to separate. They can win across the board.
When these teams met on Jonuary 31d, Seattie completely
controled the game despite the low final score. They out-
gained Son Francisco 180-63 on the ground and 197-127
through the air while dominating time of possession 38 minutes
to 22. The only thing preventing o blowout wos o 0-3
performance in the red zone. With even overage finishing, that

the twelfth man, with the matchup edges clearly dofined on
